purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it is a fork briefing that records background, needs, research mandate, and constraints.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a constrained, research-led container for a forked build effort, deliberately avoiding premature solution planning while capturing intent, scope, and governance.
novelty: Explicitly forbids creating a plan by design and frames the entire scope as NEEDS rather than tasks or features.
contribution: Provides a high-level contextual anchor for a fork, capturing intent, constraints, and an ordered set of related items without prescribing implementation.
summary_for_embedding: Draft noticeboard item item-91983d4f records a fork briefing for building an interface and its system under Tim's architecture, framing scope as needs, mandating internal and external research, and explicitly forbidding a plan by design.
intention_for_embedding: To establish a research-first, no-plan governance context for a forked build effort and link it to related background and scope items.
